experience.organization: Prinses Maxima Centre for Pediatric Oncology
bullets: Developing deep-learning and MIL pipelines for WSI analysis of Wilms tumor, targeting anaplasia grading and clinical outcome prediction.
Coordinating multi-center dataset integration across collaborating hospitals.
Translating model outputs into interpretable biomarkers in collaboration with pathologists and pediatric oncologists.
Supervising students; contributing to peer-reviewed publications.

Developed deep-learning pipelines for pancreatic cancer WSI analysis within PANCAIM (EU Horizon 2020): multi-class U-Net for TSR quantification (368 patients / 4 datasets / 25 NL labs; Dice 0.75-0.86; TSR AUC 0.61 on TCGA-PAAD). Published in PLOS ONE (2024) and SPIE MI (2022).

Extended to multi-tissue segmentation for combining AI-based biomarkers (TSR, mitosis density, stromal cell density, TTR) in multivariate PDAC survival analysis. Published at COMPAYL (MICCAI 2025 workshop).

Co-authored multi-center clinical studies: European Radiology (2025) on multimodal prognostication; The Lancet Oncology (2025) PANORAMA study; Medical Image Analysis (2025) scoping review on multimodal AI.
Teaching Assistant for Image Analysis and Medical Imaging Analysis (4 course editions, Radboud University); co-supervised Master's theses.
Built AI chatbots and conversational systems for clients in banking and automotive.
Annotated industrial data for object recognition systems and developed live translation pipelines for video content.

experience.organization: ViCOROB - NeuroImage Computing Group, University of Girona
bullets: Benchmarked MRI synthesis architectures (ResU-Net, cGAN, CycleGAN) on WMH and BraTS 2018 datasets.
ResU-Net showed superior SSIM and lower MSE vs. GAN variants under data-scarce conditions; informed Master's thesis (grade 8.6/10).
